zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Menteith於1355年8月出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，她的父親John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse30歲，母親Marjorie Stirling31歲。她於1370年與John Livingston of Callendar在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年8月在蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Menteith于1355年8月出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，她的父亲John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse30岁，母亲Marjorie Stirling31岁。她于1370年与John Livingston of Callendar在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年8月在苏格兰斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Menteith was born in August 1355, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse, was 30 and her mother, Marjorie Stirling, was 31. She married John Livingston of Callendar in 1370, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She died in August 1387, in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Menteith est née en août 1355, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Stirling, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Livingston of Callendar en 1370, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1387, à Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Menteith im August 1355 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse 30 und ihre Mutter Marjorie Stirling 31. Sie hat 1370 in Schottland, United Kingdom John Livingston of Callendar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1387 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Menteith è nata il nel agosto 1355 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Marjorie Stirling, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Livingston of Callendar nel 1370, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1387, nel Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Menteithが1355年8月にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Menteith, First Lord of Kerseは30歳，母Marjorie Stirlingは31歳であった。1370年にイギリススコットランドでJohn Livingston of Callendarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年8月にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカレンダー パークで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Menteith(이)가 1355년 8월 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjorie Stirling(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 John Livingston of Callendar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 8월 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 캘렌더르 박에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Menteith nasceu em agosto de 1355, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie Stirling, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Livingston of Callendar em 1370, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1387, em Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Menteith родилась август 1355 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Stirling, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Livingston of Callendar в 1370 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла август 1387 г. в местности каллендар парк, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie Menteith nació en agosto de 1355, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marjorie Stirling, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Livingston of Callendar en 1370, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1387, en Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 32 años.
